prediction.reasoning: Based on historical volatility analysis of MSFT (~25% annualized), the stock typically exhibits daily volatility around 1.6%. Over 20 trading days, this translates to approximately 7.1% standard deviation. The point estimate assumes slight positive drift consistent with long-term tech stock performance. Confidence intervals are constructed using normal distribution assumptions around the geometric Brownian motion model, with widening ranges to reflect increased uncertainty over the 20-day horizon.
